caption: A news broadcast begins with a male anchor in a grey suit and glasses sitting in a studio. The screen displays "PLUS POLITICS" and a graphic for a guest "ON THE PHONE," identifying "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI" as a "POLITICAL ANALYST" in "LAGOS." A lower banner reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." The scene transitions to footage of Bola Tinubu, wearing a light-colored garment and a red traditional cap with ornate patterns, speaking while wearing glasses. In the background, other men are present, including one in a striped garment and another in a dark green outfit. The banner "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU" and the "PLUS POLITICS" label remain on screen throughout the footage. Text at the bottom fluctuates between "FOLLOW US" and "SUBSCRIBE" with the web address "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA" and later "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" accompanied by social media icons and "PLUSTVAFRICA."
